title: Cpvp Crossbow
description: If your only tipped arrow type is already loaded in the crossbow, the loaded-arrow indicator is hidden — it only shows when the loaded arrow is different from what you'd refill with.
body: a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that adds a small arrow HUD near your crosshair so you always know what's loaded and what's coming next. When you're holding a crossbow, two arrow icons appear on the left of your screen — the top one shows what's currently loaded, and the bottom one shows what you'll reload with. When you fire and reload, the bottom icon smoothly slides up into the loaded slot, giving you a clean visual cue without any clutter.
